purpose: Defines what belongs in the Mindshare Central desktop app package, what is bundled content, what is excluded, and what remains runtime user data.

shipInApp.notes: Central UI pages and office surfaces.
Role files needed for offices and context loading. Exclude volatile proof/state unless promoted to app state.
Only active or required office support files.

shipInApp.source: selected global roster, artifacts, taxonomy, and manifest files
shipInApp.notes: Global context required by role loading and configuration.

shipInApp.source: selected docs/; catalogs/; phases/; rooms/; templates/
shipInApp.notes: Only docs used by Central, role context, configuration, or tools.

shipInApp.source: selected C:/Users/scott/Code/mojo assets/maps, maps, roles, agents
shipInApp.notes: Only content needed by Central UI and role offices.
Only active roles/offices that Central can load.

doNotShip: runtime proof/state files unless explicitly promoted
externalRequirements: Codex CLI installed and authenticated locally
Claude CLI installed and authenticated locally
Optional webview logins for connected tools
currentDecisions: Chrome extension/native-host path is deprecated for Mindshare Central installer builds.
local-client/app-content is generated content and should become manifest-driven build output.
Canonical app UI currently lives in public/ and syncs into local-client/app-content/mindshare/public/.
The sync script should be narrowed before installer packaging.
maintenanceRules: Add app-required files here before relying on them.
Exclude development-only files here before installer work.
Move mutable role/runtime state to runtimeDataOutsideApp instead of baking it into the app.
Installer builds should report included, excluded, missing, and generated manifest entries.
